svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Single control plane · four data-plane shapes · single-node or multi-node HA · grounded AI copilot
• API-first — UI + CLI + MCP share one REST surface.
• Agent local cache survives control-plane outage.

g.text: pulls: roles · A/B OS upgrade · firewall · host-config
enforces on host (k3s node label · nft · grub)
SNMP · NTP · LLDP · syslog · SSH · timezone

svg.text: Data plane — independent shapes, mix freely

g.text: spatium-dns-agent · PowerDNS · REST Control Agent · DNSSEC

svg.text: PSK/pairing→JWT · long-poll ETag · last-known-good cache · DNS engine mutually exclusive

g.text: Path B — WinRM zone CRUD (DnsServer PS)

svg.text: no software on the DC · credentials Fernet-encrypted on the server row
Agentless (cloud DNS) — provider API, no agent
control plane calls REST/SDK directly · import-existing-zones
Read-only integration mirrors — scheduled pull → IPAM (never written back)
supervisor: register · heartbeat · pull desired-state (roles · upgrade · firewall · host-config)
API → data plane (direct): long-poll /config · RFC 2136 / WinRM · REST/SDK
